name: Sex and the City
description: HBO's influential late-'90s/early-2000s comedy about four single women in New York City

questions.q: On which U.S. premium cable network did Sex and the City originally air?

source.notes: First cable series to win the Emmy for Outstanding Comedy Series.

questions.q: Which actress plays columnist Carrie Bradshaw?

source.notes: Parker also served as executive producer by Season 6.

questions.q: Who plays the sexually liberated PR executive Samantha Jones?

source.notes: Declined to return for the sequel series And Just Like That...

questions.q: Which actress plays art dealer Charlotte York?

source.notes: Davis turned down the Carrie role to play Charlotte.

questions.q: Who plays the cynical lawyer Miranda Hobbes?

source.notes: Later ran for Governor of New York in 2018.

questions.q: In what city is Sex and the City primarily set?

source.notes: Manhattan is treated as practically a fifth main character.

questions.q: How many seasons did the original Sex and the City series run?

source.notes: 94 episodes over 1998-2004.

questions.q: Who created Sex and the City for television?

source.notes: Also created Beverly Hills, 90210 and Emily in Paris.

questions.q: The series was based on a newspaper column and book by which author?

source.notes: Bushnell's column ran in the New York Observer from 1994.

questions.q: In what year did Sex and the City premiere on HBO?

source.notes: Ran until February 2004.

questions.q: What is Carrie Bradshaw's profession?

source.notes: Writes the 'Sex and the City' column for the fictional New York Star.

questions.q: What is the full name of Carrie's on-again/off-again partner 'Mr. Big'?

source.notes: Revealed only in the series finale.

questions.q: Who plays Carrie's carpenter boyfriend Aidan Shaw?

source.notes: Also starred in Northern Exposure and My Big Fat Greek Wedding.

questions.q: What is Miranda's profession?

source.notes: Corporate litigator based in Manhattan.

questions.q: Who is Charlotte's second husband — a bald Jewish divorce lawyer?

source.notes: Played by Evan Handler.

questions.q: Who plays Miranda's bartender-turned-husband Steve Brady?

source.notes: Also stars as Herrmann on Chicago Fire.

questions.q: Which Russian dancer-actor plays Season 6 love interest Aleksandr Petrovsky?

source.notes: Legendary ballet dancer who defected from the USSR in 1974.

questions.q: What is Samantha's profession?

source.notes: Samantha Jones Public Relations is her own firm.

questions.q: Which 2021 sequel series revived the show on HBO Max without Samantha?

source.notes: Catchphrase from Carrie's columns.

questions.q: Which high-end designer shoes are so central to Carrie's wardrobe that she name-drops them constantly?

source.notes: The show and 2008 film sparked a global Manolo craze.

questions.q: Which costume designer is widely credited with the show's massive fashion influence?

source.notes: Won a Costume Designers Guild lifetime achievement award.

questions.q: Which notable visual change was made to the show's opening title sequence after the September 11, 2001 attacks?
choices: The Statue of Liberty was removed
The Twin Towers were replaced with the Empire State Building

source.notes: The change preserved the skyline as an enduring image of New York.
